scripts.check: pnpm audit:surface && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:go && pnpm build && pnpm pack:packages && pnpm smoke:consumer && pnpm smoke:cloudflare
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-state-memory publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-state-simple publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-state-file publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-state-sqlite publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-state-indexeddb publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-cloudflare publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-chat-adapter publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @beeper/pickle-ai-sdk publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.test:docker: pnpm build && BMJS_E2E_REDIS_PORT=${BMJS_E2E_REDIS_PORT:-6380} docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait redis && BMJS_E2E_REDIS_PORT=${BMJS_E2E_REDIS_PORT:-6380} node scripts/docker-redis-store-smoke.mjs
